name: Artificial Intelligence
description: Explore the latest advances in AI systems, large language models, and intelligent automation shaping the future of technology.

name: Machine Learning
description: Deep dives into ML algorithms, model training pipelines, evaluation strategies, and real-world deployment patterns.

name: Data Science
description: From exploratory analysis and statistical modelling to storytelling with data and building reproducible research pipelines.

name: Web Development
description: Full-stack web engineering: REST APIs, authentication, performance optimisation, and modern architectural patterns.

name: Frontend Development
description: Component architecture, state management, accessibility, animations, and everything that runs in the browser.

name: Backend Development
description: Server-side architecture, databases, microservices, event-driven systems, and API design for scalable applications.

name: Cloud Computing
description: AWS, Azure, and GCP deep dives: serverless, managed services, cost optimisation, and cloud-native design patterns.

name: DevOps
description: CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, infrastructure as code, and site reliability engineering practices.

name: Cybersecurity
description: Threat modelling, penetration testing, zero-trust architecture, and secure software development lifecycle.

name: Data Engineering
description: ETL pipelines, data lakes, streaming architectures, and the tooling that powers modern analytical platforms.

name: Quantum Computing
description: Quantum circuits, error correction, variational algorithms, and the path toward quantum advantage over classical systems.

name: Blockchain
description: Smart contracts, DeFi protocols, Layer 2 scaling, and the decentralised infrastructure reshaping finance and ownership.

name: Internet of Things
description: Connected device architectures, edge computing, MQTT messaging, and secure IoT deployments at industrial scale.

name: Game Development
description: Game engine internals, shader programming, procedural generation, physics simulation, and multiplayer architecture.

name: Mobile Development
description: Cross-platform and native mobile engineering with React Native, Flutter, Swift, and Kotlin for iOS and Android.

name: Mathematics
description: Mathematical foundations for computing: linear algebra, optimization, probability, statistics, and numerical methods.

name: Computer Science
description: Algorithms, data structures, complexity, distributed systems, databases, and core principles of software systems.
